__fixture__.name: evidence_only_channel_version_drift
__fixture__.scenario: A package is synced between two side-by-side installs on different release channels and versions. The producer build does not match the importer, and the provider connection for the only live surface is unavailable on this channel. Import refuses to claim authority: the outcome is Manual review with an Evidence only restore, and the prior artifact stays available for compare and export.
doc_sections: UI/UX Spec 6.14 Workspace serialization, portable-state packages, and restore provenance

missing_surface_placeholders.notes: Side-by-side channel/version drift: the provider was unavailable on this channel, so only evidence survived.

notes: Evidence only under manual review. Producer build and channel drift were surfaced rather than hidden; the prior artifact stays available for compare and export.
